judgment.summary: Profitable company with strong free cash flow trading at a low multiple, but facing declining earnings and analyst growth estimates.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 5.6%; next earnings date is 2026-07-28.
positives: Trailing P/E 8.34x and Forward P/E 7.70x are very low for a profitable company.
PEG ratio of 0.81 suggests potential undervaluation relative to earnings growth.
Strong free cash flow of $4.08B TTM supports operations and shareholder returns.
Return on equity at 25.1% indicates efficient use of shareholder capital.
negatives: Revenue growth is a modest 7.2% YoY, with current quarter earnings growth negative at -13.5%.
Analyst growth estimates for the current quarter and fiscal year are negative.
Total debt of $11.67B exceeds total cash of $9.34B.
Analyst consensus is 'hold' with a wide dispersion in price targets.

news.paragraph: PayPal Holdings (PYPL) is seeing new attention as Michael Burry, known for his prescient market calls, has initiated a new position in the company. While recent headlines focus on unrelated IPO news from SpaceX, Burry's stake suggests potential upside that traders may wish to consider. The market will also be looking ahead to PayPal's next earnings report, scheduled for July 28th.

headlines.title: Factbox-IPO-bound SpaceX's board is stacked with Musk empire loyalists
SpaceX IPO Set to Deliver Massive Returns to Investors
PayPal Holdings Inc. (PYPL): Michael Burry Initiates New Position

examples.body: $PYPL good first entry point?? Let me know
$PYPL give me 48-50 so I can start writing covered calls again!
